name: pg-hotspots-cli
desc: PostgreSQL Hotspots is a diagnostic cli tool built for high-pressure “database down” situations...All reports are written into an interactive html file + txt f…
descFull: PostgreSQL Hotspots is a diagnostic cli tool built for high-pressure “database down” situations...All reports are written into an interactive html file + txt file so the result can be shared and used with customers easily  Besides, metrics have been mapped into a diagnosis-ready format for rapid trouble-shooting.
